dashboard.label: Aegis-Mind Agentic NOC Dashboard
dashboard.description: Autonomous Multi-Agent Crisis Management and Incident Response Center

single.title: Active AI Agent Status

search.query: | makeresults | eval status="Autonomous Orchestration Active" | fields status

single.option: Google Antigravity SDK & Splunk MCP Live

search.query: | makeresults | eval mttr="4.2 Seconds" | fields mttr
| makeresults | eval savings="$24,500 USD" | fields savings

chart.title: Cisco Deep Time Series: Real-time network throughput vs Baseline and Forecast

search.query: | makeresults count=100 | streamstats count as time_id | eval _time=now() - (time_id * 60) | eval baseline=120 | eval throughput=if(time_id < 20, 120 + random() % 20, if(time_id < 40, 600 + random() % 200, 120 + random() % 30)) | eval forecast=if(time_id < 20, 122, if(time_id < 40, 750, 120)) | timechart span=1m avg(throughput) as Throughput, avg(baseline) as Baseline, avg(forecast) as Forecast

| makeresults count=3 | streamstats count as rank | eval _time=if(rank==1, now() - 60, if(rank==2, now() - 3600, now() - 7200)) | eval Incident=if(rank==1, "Kubernetes IAM Credential Leak", if(rank==2, "SSH Brute-Force", "SQL Injection Tampering")) | eval Agent_Triage=if(rank==1, "Foundation-Sec classified: TRUE POSITIVE", if(rank==2, "Foundation-Sec classified: FALSE POSITIVE (Suppressed)", "Foundation-Sec classified: TRUE POSITIVE")) | eval Severity=if(rank==1, "CRITICAL", if(rank==2, "LOW", "HIGH")) | eval Mitigation=if(rank==1, "Revoked IAM role k8s-pod-secrets-reader", if(rank==2, "Pipeline stopped by Circuit Breaker", "Blocked attacker IP on Firewall")) | eval Verification=if(rank==1, "Efficacy confirmed - nominal metrics", if(rank==2, "Quota saved", "Efficacy confirmed")) | fields _time, Incident, Agent_Triage, Severity, Mitigation, Verification
